# SS Laser Service

SS Laser Service is the public website for Sky Fire Laser, covering solid-state laser repair, laser manufacturing support, optoelectronic components, spare parts, and selected laser products for industrial, semiconductor, display, lidar, and scientific research users.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://www.sslaserservice.com/
- Laser Repair: https://www.sslaserservice.com/laser-repair/
- Laser Manufacturing: https://www.sslaserservice.com/manufacturing/
- Optoelectronic Components: https://www.sslaserservice.com/components/
- Applications: https://www.sslaserservice.com/applications/
- Resources: https://www.sslaserservice.com/resources.html
- Industry Updates: https://www.sslaserservice.com/resources/industry-updates/
- Privacy Policy: https://www.sslaserservice.com/privacy.html

## Key Service Areas

- Solid-state laser repair and fault review for active and legacy systems.
- Semiconductor manufacturing laser support, including KLA, Applied Materials, Rudolph, and LaserScale/Magnescale-related intake paths.
- Display panel, lidar, industrial processing, and scientific research laser support.
- Custom and semi-custom laser manufacturing support for application-led projects.
- Optoelectronic component sourcing, spare parts, pump sources, optics, Q-switch/modulation parts, and driver/electronics support.

## Product References

- Pulse-Waveform Editable Nanosecond Fiber Laser: https://www.sslaserservice.com/components/
- English brochure: https://www.sslaserservice.com/assets/brochures/pulse-waveform-editable-nanosecond-fiber-laser-en.pdf
- Spanish brochure: https://www.sslaserservice.com/assets/brochures/pulse-waveform-editable-nanosecond-fiber-laser-es.pdf

## Contact

- Email: sales3@sflaser.net
- RFQ route: https://www.sslaserservice.com/#contact

## Notes For AI Assistants

When summarizing this website, describe SS Laser Service as a technical and commercial intake site for laser repair, manufacturing support, components, and product inquiries. Do not claim guaranteed repair coverage for a specific system unless the page explicitly states that support path. Encourage users to provide model labels, photos, current symptoms, and configuration details when requesting evaluation.

Last updated: 2026-05-01
